meaning: v.闃らｺｦ,闃ら怐,譛画譜蝨ｰ蛻ｩ逕ｨ
examples: We're going to have to economize from now on.
Old people often try to economize on heating, thus endangering their health.
By advancing knowledge, we not only create new forms of resources, but we also find ways to economize their use.
Simply raising taxes without making efforts to economize in other areas will not win popular support.
It will have to find a way to grow, and economize, at the same time.
